narrative:
Sycamore A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 131 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 49.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 46.6 percentage points.
